meaning: n.精致,(言谈,举止等的)文雅,精巧
examples: Phase III, from March 1991 to March 1993, focused on the refinement and institutionalization of these activities.
This particular model has a further refinement.
The new plan is a refinement of the one before.
The nondancing courtiers perform amateurishly and busily, improvising and cape-swirling with little decorum or refinement.
Through out the shows in Milan, it was mostly about refinement and conservative looks.
